title: puccinellia distans subsp. glauca
intro: Puccinellia distans subsp. glauca, also known as saltwort, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the grass family Poaceae. The medicinal properties of Puccinellia distans subsp. glauca include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant and antibacterial activities. The plant is known for its health benefits, which include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Puccinellia distans subsp. glauca is used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
